title: specgen/generate: Fix log tag priority
body:
Currently setting log_tag from containers.conf will override any value set via --log-opt tag=value option. This PR fixes this.

Fixes: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/26236

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
Fixed log_tag from containers.conf overriding --log-opt tag=value option specified via command line.
```

LGTM.

btw, I noticed we have quite a few time.Sleep calls in tests - adds up to almost a minute overall. It’s fine for this PR, but maybe we could look into replacing them with shorter retries in the future to cut down test time.

/lgtm

> btw, I noticed we have quite a few time.Sleep calls in tests - adds up to almost a minute overall. It’s fine for this PR, but maybe we could look into replacing them with shorter retries in the future to cut down test time.

Yes but keep in mind journald and logs in general are super flaky so this would need to be done with care.
